beats.caption: AC-1 - state + 6 live busy signals
beats.expectedScreen: the Power page (sticky header shows POWER and a BUSY badge) with the Busy signals list rendering all six rows and live values: Working sessions 1 working, In-flight cards 0 in flight, Presence heartbeat, SSH sessions, Load average, Keep Awake

beats.caption: AC-2 - seeded session holds box BUSY
beats.expectedScreen: the BUSY badge in the header and the hero reading 'Box is busy / a signal is holding it awake' — the countdown is held (not counting down) because a signal blocks

beats.caption: AC-3 - Keep Awake pinned 1h (blocks suspend)
beats.expectedScreen: the Keep Awake panel switched to an active pin reading 'until <time>' with a Cancel button, after tapping 1h

beats.caption: AC-4 - usable at 390x844: full-width touch target
beats.expectedScreen: the page on a narrow 390px phone viewport with the full-width Suspend Now button highlighted as a large single-column touch target below the hero
